use_cases: Landing page hero for AI/ML product companies
Tech startup product showcases with animated neural network visualizations
SaaS landing pages seeking interactive 3D hero sections
Dark-themed product launch pages with cosmic aesthetics
ai_summary: An immersive hero component featuring an animated 3D neural network canvas with mouse-interactive parallax and pulsing synaptic connections. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and glass-morphism card styling, creating a cosmic AI-themed experience ideal for landing pages of artificial intelligence and machine learning products.
